errors.authExpired: Session expired — please log in again
errors.fileParseError: Failed to parse the uploaded file
errors.llmAuthFailed: Authentication failed — please check your API key
errors.llmRateLimit: Rate limit exceeded — please wait and try again
errors.llmContextTooLong: Input too long — please reduce the data size or prompt length
errors.llmModelNotFound: Model not found — please check the model name
errors.llmTimeout: Request timed out — please check connectivity and try again
errors.llmServiceError: The model service returned an error — please try again later
errors.llmContentFiltered: The request was blocked by the content safety filter
errors.codeExecutionError: An error occurred during code execution
errors.catalogSyncTimeout: Catalog sync timed out — please try again
errors.catalogNotFound: Connector not found or not connected
errors.annotationConflict: Annotation was modified — please reload and try again
errors.storageFull: Workspace storage is full. Free disk space and try again.
